de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    BlockContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp, BlockContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp

    public abstract class AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp
extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of AbstractBlockContractRule.
